remarks: Enjoy comfortable, low-maintenance living in this well-maintained home featuring a new HVAC heat pump (2024) and a freshly painted interior. The open-concept living and dining area is highlighted by a wood-burning fireplace and sliding glass doors leading to a large, private Trex deck overlooking one of the community pools and a peaceful wooded setting. Outdoor furniture may remain for the buyer's enjoyment. The eat-in kitchen offers stainless steel appliances, new flooring, and a functional layout. The freshly cleaned carpeting adds to the home's move-in-ready appeal. Upstairs, you'll find two spacious bedrooms, a convenient stackable washer and dryer, and a pull-down attic providing valuable additional storage. The complex is beautifully maintained with mature trees, attractive landscaping, and excellent amenities. (Every homeowner I talked with, loves it there). The special assessment has been paid in full, which included the paving of the driveways. Residents enjoy access to two swimming pools, a kiddie pool, clubhouse, and tennis/pickleball courts, offering a wonderful lifestyle in a well-cared-for community. Reserved parking space is #56.2nd spot is marked V for visitors. Majority of complex is owner occupied:  234 units, 29 are reported as investor owned. Owner must live there for 1 year before renting
